title: Garlicky Tender Moroccan Serrano Ham Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix moroccan dish featuring tender serrano ham slices in a flavorful garlic sauce that's perfect for a midday meal or snack.
instructions: Preheat your pan over medium heat.
Add olive oil and minced garlic to the pan, stirring occasionally until the garlic turns golden brown, about 1-2 minutes.
Add finely chopped red onion into the pan and cook for another minute or until softened.
Gently add sliced Serrano Ham to the pan, distributing evenly. Cook for approximately 3-4 minutes on each side until fully heated and lightly golden.
Season with salt and pepper if needed.
